    def test_reload_flag_without_i3msg(temp_files):
        """--reload should attempt to reload config with i3-msg"""
        config = temp_files.create("config", """
    font pango:Mono 8
    bar {
      colors {
        separator #ffffff
      }
    }
    client.focused #ffffff #ffffff #000000
    """)
    
        # Create a fake i3-msg that just exits successfully
        fake_i3msg = temp_files.create("i3-msg", """#!/bin/bash
    exit 0
    """)
        os.chmod(fake_i3msg, 0o755)
    
        # Add to PATH
        env = os.environ.copy()
        env["PATH"] = str(temp_files.tempdir) + ":" + env["PATH"]
        env.pop("WAYLAND_DISPLAY", None)  # Ensure X11 mode
    
        result = run("default", "-c", str(config), "-r", env=env)
        # Should succeed
>       assert result.returncode == 0
E       AssertionError
